productDoc.name: BPC-157
productDoc.description: A pentadecapeptide with potent cytoprotective, angiogenic, and wound-healing properties under experimental conditions.

productDoc.name: TB-500
productDoc.description: A synthetic version of the naturally occurring peptide present in all cellular components promoting endothelial cell differentiation and angiogenesis.

productDoc.name: GLOW
productDoc.description: A proprietary experimental blend combining cytoprotective properties, angiogenic stimulation, and tissue remodeling mechanisms.

productDoc.name: KLOW
productDoc.description: A multifaceted blend incorporating anti-inflammatory KPV with tissue repair agents for comprehensive cellular research.

productDoc.name: KPV
productDoc.description: A tripeptide (Lys-Pro-Val) featuring strong antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.

productDoc.name: ARA-290
productDoc.description: A non-erythropoietic peptide engineered to interact with the innate repair receptor, reducing inflammation and neurodegeneration.

productDoc.name: Tirzepatide
productDoc.description: A dual GIP and GLP-1 receptor agonist fundamentally altering energy metabolism and insulin secretion profiles.

productDoc.name: Retatrutide
productDoc.description: A novel triple hormone receptor agonist (GIP, GLP-1, and Glucagon) exhibiting pronounced metabolic regulatory effects.

productDoc.name: Semaglutide
productDoc.description: A selective GLP-1 receptor agonist with structural modifications to extend plasma half-life via albumin binding.

productDoc.name: Cagrilintide
productDoc.description: A long-acting amylin analog investigated for its synergistic action in energy balance and satiation mechanisms.

productDoc.name: AOD-9604
productDoc.description: A modified fragment of the C-terminal region of Human Growth Hormone noted for lipolytic stimulation.

productDoc.name: 5-AMINO 1 MQ
productDoc.description: An inhibitor of the enzyme nicotinamide N-methyltransferase (NNMT), implicated in cellular energy expenditure.

productDoc.name: MOTS-C
productDoc.description: A mitochondrial-derived peptide regulating metabolic homeostasis and preventing diet-induced obesity in models.

productDoc.name: SLU PP-332
productDoc.description: An estrogen-related receptor (ERR) agonist simulating structural metabolic adaptations similar to endurance training.

productDoc.name: GW-501516
productDoc.description: A PPARδ receptor agonist evaluating alterations in fatty acid oxidation and exercise endurance mechanisms.

productDoc.name: Epithalon
productDoc.description: A synthetic tetrapeptide proven to upregulate telomerase activity and extend cellular lifespan in in-vitro models.

productDoc.name: GHK-Cu
productDoc.description: A naturally occurring copper complex involved in widespread remodeling, collagen stimulation, and anti-oxidant activity.

productDoc.name: NAD+
productDoc.description: A crucial cellular coenzyme found in all living cells, essential in metabolic red-ox reactions and sirtuin function.

productDoc.name: NMN
productDoc.description: A direct precursor to NAD+, actively investigated for its capability to mitigate age-associated physiological decline.

productDoc.name: SS-31
productDoc.description: A mitochondria-targeted peptide (Elamipretide) that binds cardiolipin to restore mitochondrial bioenergetics.

productDoc.name: Selank
productDoc.description: A synthetic heptapeptide derived from human tuftsin showcasing marked anxiolytic and nootropic potentials.

productDoc.name: Semax
productDoc.description: An ACTH analog known for its neuroprotective, neuromodulatory and potent cognitive enhancement effects.

productDoc.name: Pinealon
productDoc.description: A short synthetic peptide influencing cerebral cortex functions and enhancing cellular resistance to hypoxia.

productDoc.name: DSIP
productDoc.description: Delta Sleep-Inducing Peptide, a neuropeptide affecting central neuroendocrine regulations and circadian rhythms.

productDoc.name: PE-22 28
productDoc.description: A TREK-1 potassium channel antagonist under study for robust antidepressant-like mechanisms.

productDoc.name: CJC-1295 without DAC
productDoc.description: A synthetic GHRH analog that increases pulsatile growth hormone and IGF-1 secretions without altering cortisol levels.

productDoc.name: CJC-1295 with DAC
productDoc.description: A long-acting GHRH analog paired with a Drug Affinity Complex to maximize half-life and stimulate continuous GH release.

productDoc.name: FST-344
productDoc.description: A potent autocrine glycoprotein that acts as an antagonist to myostatin, substantially accelerating muscle hypertrophy.

productDoc.name: IGF-1 LR3
productDoc.description: A highly engineered variant of Insulin-like Growth Factor-1 with an extended half-life dictating profound cellular hyperplasia.

productDoc.name: PEG MGF
productDoc.description: Pegylated Mechano Growth Factor, a slice variant of IGF-1 promoting localized stem cell proliferation strictly in muscle tissue.

productDoc.name: MK-677
productDoc.description: An orally active, non-peptide secretagogue of the ghrelin receptor elevating GH and IGF-1 secretion.

productDoc.name: HGH
productDoc.description: Recombinant Human Growth Hormone essential for systemic cellular regeneration, growth, and metabolic regulation.

productDoc.name: HCG
productDoc.description: Human Chorionic Gonadotropin; extensively utilized to stimulate the Leydig cells in the synthesis of endogenous testosterone.

productDoc.name: HMG
productDoc.description: Human Menopausal Gonadotropin used in advanced fertility research to stimulate follicular growth and spermatogenesis.

productDoc.name: Ipamorelin
productDoc.description: A highly selective and potent GHRP that stimulates massive growth hormone release safely without spiking cortisol or prolactin.

productDoc.name: GHRP-2
productDoc.description: A hexapeptide acting as a strong growth hormone secretagogue and ghrelin receptor agonist.

productDoc.name: Hexarelin
productDoc.description: One of the most potent fast-acting GH secretagogues.

productDoc.name: Sermorelin
productDoc.description: A 29-amino acid polypeptide representing the shortest functional fragment of endogenous GHRH.

productDoc.name: Tesamorelin
productDoc.description: A synthetically stabilized GHRH analog verified to reduce severe visceral adipose tissue accumulation.

productDoc.name: Kisspeptin-10
productDoc.description: The active fragment of kisspeptin crucially stimulating the secretion of GnRH to reset the HPTA axis.

productDoc.name: Oxytocin Acetate
productDoc.description: A neurohypophysial hormone mediating complex social, reproductive, and stress-regulating behaviors.

productDoc.name: MT2
productDoc.description: A synthetic analog of alpha-MSH inducing remarkable melanogenesis and demonstrating robust aphrodisiac properties.

productDoc.name: PT-141
productDoc.description: A cyclic heptapeptide functioning as an agonist at melanocortin receptors heavily researched for sexual dysfunction.
mechanisms: central nervous system sexual pathway activation

productDoc.name: PNC-27
productDoc.description: An investigative anti-cancer peptide binding strongly to MDM2 in cellular membranes orchestrating rapid tumor cell necrosis.

productDoc.name: Snap-8
productDoc.description: An octapeptide acting as an elongation of Argireline, interfering with the SNARE complex to minimize topical wrinkle formation.

productDoc.name: Thymulin
productDoc.description: A nonapeptide requiring zinc for biological activity, involved fundamentally in T-cell differentiation and maturation.

productDoc.name: Thymosin Alpha 1
productDoc.description: An endogenous modifier of immune response directly augmenting the operational efficiency of T-cell-mediated responses.

productDoc.name: Cartalax
productDoc.description: A synthetic dipeptide targeting the normalization of metabolic processes in bone and cartilaginous tissues.

productDoc.name: Cardiogen
productDoc.description: A tetrapeptide clinically proven to stimulate cellular proliferation and reduce apoptosis within cardiovascular tissues.

productDoc.name: Thymagen
productDoc.description: A dipeptide immuno-modulator aimed at restoring optimal physiological ratios among T-lymphocyte sub-populations.

productDoc.name: Prostamax
productDoc.description: A specialized bioregulator peptide targeting cellular regeneration precisely within prostate gland tissues.

productDoc.name: Testagen
productDoc.description: A synthesized targeted peptide designed to correct morphological and functional parameters of the male reproductive system.

productDoc.name: Bacteriostatic Water
productDoc.description: Sterile water containing 0.9% benzyl alcohol. Essential for correctly reconstituting lyophilized peptides for long-term stability.

productDoc.name: Precision Insulin Syringes
productDoc.description: 31G x 8mm sterile U-100 syringes tailored for painless, extremely precise subcutaneous dosing under research conditions.
